ministry: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare / RBI
benefit: Revolving crop loan at subsidised interest rate (4% effective with interest subvention for loans up to ₹3L). Also covers post-harvest, farm maintenance, and consumption needs.
application_portal: Through bank branches / PM Kisan portal (for PM-KISAN linked KCC)
notes: KCC is technically a bank product but backed by government guidelines and interest subvention. It is a prerequisite enabler for PMFBY (mandatory enrollment for loanee farmers). Tenant/sharecrop farmers can also get KCC with No Objection Certificate from land owner.

conditions.description: Must be engaged in agriculture or allied activities
conditions.source: RBI KCC guidelines — farmers, sharecroppers, tenant farmers, oral lessees eligible

conditions.description: Must have some form of land association (owned, leased, or sharecrop)

conditions.source: RBI circular — tenant/sharecrop farmers eligible with NOC from landowner
conditions.ambiguity_note: Bank discretion varies significantly — some banks insist on collateral even for small loans

conditions.description: Must NOT be a wilful defaulter

required_documents.document: Land records / NOC from landowner (for leased land)
